summary: Iter 55 OPERATE UX rebuild — comprehensive frontend verification. All 16 review-request tests PASS. The new minimal premium audit page renders in the exact spec order (Hero → Main Finding → 4 Key Cards → Market Position bar → Next Best Action → Top 3 Fixes → Build Action Plan CTA → Collapsed Details). Cinematic Thinking (~5s) + Opener (~3.2s) flow works; opener-continue button reliably advances to result. Market Position bar shows all 4 markers (YOU/MARKET/TARGET/TOP). Close-the-Gap modal opens with 'Move from 60 → 80' header, 3 numbered steps each labelled 'Expected gain · +N pts', a 'TOTAL TARGET GAIN +20 pts' summary, and a green 'Build Action Plan' CTA; closes via Escape/X. All 4 detail toggles work: View Numbers expands listing/revenue/transformation sections, View Comparables shows the honest empty state ('No real comparable listings available yet.'), View Data Sources lists Airbnb/Booking/AirDNA/PriceLabs with USED/LIMITED/NOT CONNECTED tags, Generate Report shows Open Reports card. 'Launch Market · Athens' badge is removed from Hero and Dashboard (verified absent above-the-headline on both / and /dashboard/demo); it appears ONLY in the footer string '© 2026 PropOS · Launch market · Athens.' which matches the spec ('kept in footer only'). /dashboard/demo kicker correctly reads 'PROPOS · ASSET COMMAND CENTER' (uppercase via text-transform) with subtitle 'Your hospitality command center.' Dashboard Command Center renders 5 KPIs, Next Best Actions, Acquisition Watchlist, Market Pulse Source Ledger. Invest regression /invest/asset/demo: opener now correctly transitions to the dashboard on click — DECISION/PASS, PRICE POSITION, MARKET SUPPORT, BIGGEST RISK, NEXT BEST ACTION (5-card Decision Strip) plus VIEW NUMBERS/VIEW COMPARABLES/VIEW SOURCES/VIEW FULL REPORT (4 progressive disclosure toggles) all rendered after click (the iter54 'opener does not advance' issue is NOT reproducible in iter55). Portfolio /portfolio/demo renders with green ADD ASSET button, ALL filter pill (green active), 4 KPIs (Assets/Annual Revenue/Revenue Upside/Average PropOS Score), Biggest Opportunities + Needs Attention panels, search bar, filter chips, and asset cards. Palette is strictly green/white/charcoal — no terracotta or bronze surfaced in any tested view. Backend regression: POST /api/invest/parse-text with {listing_text: 'Koukaki 2BR apartment 65m2 listed at 280000 EUR'} returns 200 with neighborhood=Koukaki, asking_price_eur=280000, m2=65, rooms=2, price_per_sqm_eur=4308, property_type=Apartment.

minor.issue: city extraction does not pick up 'Athens' from short pasted text (returns city=null while neighborhood=Koukaki). Edge case, unchanged from iter54.

critical_code_review_comments: OperateResult section ordering implemented cleanly (verified via getBoundingClientRect ordering: 122 → 565 → 780 → 985 → 1511 → 1886 → 2481 → 2574 px) — matches the spec sequence top-to-bottom.

Market Position bar is the headline new feature and renders with all four markers; Close-the-Gap modal logic (Move from X→Y, 3 steps with Expected gain · +N pts, Total target gain · +20 pts, green Build Action Plan CTA) is wired correctly.
Honest-empty-state pattern for View Comparables is the right call given the has_real_comparables=false mock flag — no fake comps shown.

Footer string '© 2026 PropOS · Launch market · Athens.' is the only remaining Launch Market mention; this aligns with the spec but worth confirming with product whether the 'Launch market' marketing line should also be tidied since the homepage/dashboard kicker have moved on.

Iter54 'opener does not advance to invest dashboard' regression is NOT reproducible in iter55 — both /operate cinematic flow and /invest/asset/demo opener transitions succeed on a single force-click after the data-ready=true gate.
test_credentials: none required — all flows tested are public demo routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter55 OPERATE UX rebuild is fully verified. The new result page (OperateResult orchestrator + 8 child components) ships with all expected data-testids: operate-result-hero, operate-result-finding, operate-result-keycards, operate-result-market-position, operate-result-nba, operate-result-top-fixes, operate-build-action-plan-btn, operate-result-details. Modal CTA testid: market-position-close-gap-btn. Detail toggle testids: operate-detail-toggle-numbers / -comps / -sources / -report. Cinematic flow requires waiting ~10s (5s thinking + 3.2s opener + small buffer) before [data-testid=operate-opener-continue-btn] becomes data-ready=true. Two pieces of mocked data flagged by main agent: Market Average=72 / Top Listings=86 constants, and has_real_comparables=false (UI shows honest empty state). Backend /api/invest/parse-text minor city-extraction edge case unchanged from iter54. No bugs found; main agent can self-verify any further polish.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found this iteration.
